dialogueChunks.intro: The hunt is over, {player_name}. You managed to {quest_action}, and {quest_threat} will not trouble us again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} has been recovered, and {quest_stakes} are secure once more. {quest_ally} is already spreading the word.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your persistence made all the difference. Few would have followed this trail to the end.

playerResponses.text: The chase was worth it. Glad to see it resolved.
Just make sure you are better prepared next time.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you did what no one else could. {quest_threat} have been dealt with, and {quest_focus} is back where it belongs.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I must admit, when the trail went cold I thought we had lost. But you kept going. {quest_stakes} owe you more than I can express.
dialogueChunks.outro: You have earned a reputation here. People know: you finish what you start.

playerResponses.text: I do not leave things half done.
Reputation is nice. Payment is nicer.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. After all that effort to {quest_action}, the pursuit has finally ended.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} underestimated your tenacity. {quest_focus} stands safe, and {quest_stakes} can breathe easy again.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement will remember your name. Thank you for seeing this through.

playerResponses.text: No quarry escapes forever. Happy to help.
It was a closer call than it should have been.
Glad it is over. I need a rest.
